sample_context.structure: Ag / MoOx / PbS-EDT (100 nm) / PbS-PbI2/PbBr2 (450 nm) / ZnO / ITO

notes: 1 near-zero/noise-floor point(s) were excluded from aggregate error metrics.
Initialization switched from requested hybrid to didv_assisted because it gave a better starting score.
Worst voltage region by mean error: near_zero.
Final fit uses the best scanned m value: 2.6.

advice.title: Fit is numerically stable
advice.detail: Aggregate error is low and no fitted parameter is pinned to a bound.
advice.action: Use the physical evidence and sample context to decide whether this result is interpretable.

advice.title: Near-zero points dominate the residual
advice.detail: The current around 0 V is often close to the noise floor or sign-crossing region.
advice.action: Downweight near-zero voltage points or narrow the selected voltage window before interpreting component fractions.

advice.title: Some points were excluded from aggregate errors
advice.detail: 1 near-zero/noise-floor point(s) were excluded from aggregate error metrics.
advice.action: Inspect the error plot near 0 V; this is usually acceptable when currents are near the noise floor.

advice.title: Final fit uses the best scanned m
advice.detail: The final fit and m scan agree at m=2.6.
advice.action: Keep this m for the current window unless external evidence suggests a different leakage exponent.
